name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly changes the workflow. While the first step of the new plan covers some data cleaning, it also incorporates the System GMM estimation which was a separate step in the old plan. Furthermore, the second step of the new plan introduces a completely new methodology (constrained optimization for production parameters and 'distance to steady-state' analysis) that was not part of the original plan. Therefore, the previous execution steps do not align with the new structural requirements.
